=== unassigned_only
# TeamPanel with only unassigned players, no teams.
widget: teampanel
width: 24
height: 7
unassigned: alice
unassigned: bob
player_id: alice
===
╔══════════════════════╗
║    Unassigned        ║
║   ►alice             ║
║    bob               ║
║                      ║
║                      ║
╚══════════════════════╝

=== one_team
# TeamPanel with one team and one unassigned player.
widget: teampanel
width: 24
height: 10
unassigned: charlie
team: Red Team|#dd2222|alice,bob
player_id: alice
my_team_idx: 0
===
╔══════════════════════╗
║    Unassigned        ║
║    charlie           ║
║                      ║
║    Red Team          ║
║   ►alice             ║
║    bob               ║
║                      ║
║                      ║
╚══════════════════════╝

=== two_teams
# TeamPanel with two teams, no unassigned players.
widget: teampanel
width: 24
height: 12
team: Red Team|#dd2222|alice
team: Blue Team|#2222dd|bob,charlie
player_id: alice
my_team_idx: 0
===
╔══════════════════════╗
║    Unassigned        ║
║                      ║
║    Red Team          ║
║   ►alice             ║
║                      ║
║    Blue Team         ║
║    bob               ║
║    charlie           ║
║                      ║
║                      ║
╚══════════════════════╝

=== show_create
# TeamPanel with unassigned players and the Create Team button visible.
widget: teampanel
width: 24
height: 8
unassigned: alice
unassigned: bob
player_id: alice
show_create: true
===
╔══════════════════════╗
║    Unassigned        ║
║   ►alice             ║
║    bob               ║
║                      ║
║ [+ Create Team]      ║
║                      ║
╚══════════════════════╝
